UserComments.Comment: On Mennekes sockets do not exceed 3hrs.of continuous charging to avoid extra fees.I used 1 of free Schuko sockets,thus i charged for free,no problem,Schuko sockets r only for 6A max.current,as i spent the time in a restaurant across the square & used,what i saved for electricity by free charging to have a good diner-a very good Vegan risoto.I am also pleased by the solar power plant on the roof of the charging station,the only downside is,that the space for parking is very tiny,absolutely inadequate to so many sockets available here,& there is a Czech immigrant living in an apartment just above the charging station,who is always looking from her balcony & screaming to the crews of charging EVs,y r they using free sockets,she is always very angry,when some1 gets power for free,but it is not her business.So just be prepare to a rude Czech screaming from the nearby balcony,ignore it & go to the restaurant,while Your vehicle is charging.I would give it 6 stars,as there is solar power plant attached,U can eat gr8 food in nearby restaurant & also there r restrooms,but 1 star down for the screaming rude Czech from above & for too tiny parking area,thus it still makes up 5 stars.Enjoy.Live long & prosper.

UsageCost: Schuko sockets free of charge,without limits or authentication. Mennekes sockets payed & authenticated by RFID card, time limit 3hrs.of continuous charging, extra fees for exceeding.

AddressInfo.Title: Merged EVN+Town's Solar Public Charging Station (AC).
AddressInfo.AccessComments: Unlimited public access, but with only 1 full-size parking place(parallel,but with a trailer U will take 1 of the other small places,but possible without reversing). 3 other very small parking places,about half the size of my Citroën C0,which is about half the size of a normal EV...+ there is a lot of bike parking places around...With more vehicles extension cord r necessary equipment.

Connections.Comments: Mentioned voltage =L-N. Payed,RFID authentication,max.3hrs.of continuous charging.
Voltage =L-N. Payed,RFID authentication, EVN tariff, 3hrs.max.continuous charging.
EVN. Free charging from this socket. No authentication needed, no time limit.
Property of town. Primarily meant for e-bikes & e-scooters. Free charging from these sockets. No authentication needed, no time limit.

GeneralComments: Combined EVN & town's municipal public charging station, roofed with photovoltaic power plant on the roof.
